calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-26-2006 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-26-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DANIEL R. STERN, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF VIKING SERVICES CORP.; LIMITED SCOPE ATTORNEY MARY WHIPPLE, ESQ. APPEARS FOR DEFENDANT TRACY HANKINS, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT.

PARTIES AGREE UPON A COMPROMISE; TERMS OF THE AGREEMENT ARE PLACED ON THE RECORD WITH REGARD TO THE PREMISE LOCATED AT 123 SHOTWELL STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA; THE DEFENDANT TRACY HANKIN IS IN AGREEMENT WITH THE COMPROMISE AS FOLLOWS: THE TENANCY OF DEFENDANT TRACY HANKIN WILL TERMINATE AT MIDNIGHT, FEB-29-2006; BOTH PARTIES TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS; THE SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT WILL HAVE JURISDICTION TO ENFORCE THIS AGREEMENT; PLAINTIFFS AND DEFENDANT MUST RELINQUISH & DISCHARGE ALL AGENTS OR CLAIMS ARISING OUT OF THE TENANCY OF THE SUBJECT PREMISES & RELEASE ANY CLAIMS AS PER RESIDENTIAL RENT STABLIZATION, PER SECTION 542, C/CODE, A GENERAL RELEASE; NO STAYS OF EXECUTION WHICH ARE WAIVED BY PARTIES & NO FURTHER CLAIMS; KEYS TO PREMISE TO BE DELIVERED TO LANDLORD IMMEDIATELY AFTER MOVE-OUT DAY; ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT BY DEFENDANT WITHIN THREE DAYS OF SURRENDERING THE PROPERTY WILL BE FORFEITED; THE PLAINTIFF AGREES TO WAIVE BACK RENT OF JANUARY 2006 AND BACK RENT OF FEBRUARY 2006; ADDITIONALLY, PLAINTIFF AGREES TO PAY DEFENDANT $2,500.00 NO LATER THAN JAN-31-2006; THE SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $1,042.00 MINUS LATE FEES TO BE RETURNED TO DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT INFORMS THE COURT THERE IS UNDERSTANDING AND AGREEMENT TO COMPROMISE. TERMS OF THE COMPROMISE ARE READ INTO THE RECORD BY PLAINTIFF ATTORNEY DANIEL R. STERN, ESQ.

JUDGE PRO TEM HENRY SHAIN; REPORTER: JUNE LEATHLEY, CSR #1629; CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA (218).

payments.description: FIRST FILING UD COMPLT LESS THAN 2,500
